title: Wreath-laying ceremony for victims of Victoria Street
description: GEORGE NEWS - A wreath-laying ceremony will...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A wreath-laying ceremony will be held in remembrance of the victims who died in the Victoria Street building collapse, will be held on Sunday morning, 26 May at 09:30.


> Anyone who wants to participate is asked to bring some flowers and a small cross and meet at Checkers Redefine Boulevard in York Street.


From there the the convoy will travel down York Street to the disaster site in Victoria Street.

If anyone needs more information, please contact Johan on 072 215 5245.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
